narrative:
Brush Creek Township (precinct in Adams County) has 710 registered voters, with 45.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.3 percentage points.
